author: SyntagmaNull
name: Three-Layer Governance Probe + Inference-time Cheap Gate v2 (Signs-of-Life)
blurb: Three-layer supervision chain (Cael generation -> Monday intervention policy -> Seryn audit) wired to a minimal real_cael checkpoint. Inference-time cheap_gate_v2_candidate separates persistent-error (redirect) from pre-error (mark-only) on a small probe. Pre-compute-grant signs-of-life submission; no 8xH100 record numbers yet.
hardware: local probe on minimal real_cael checkpoint; 8xH100 SXM planned for grant run
reproducibility_notes: See README.md 'How to reproduce'. Probe outputs in probe_results/ reproduce via run_usefulness_probe_v0.py and run_aux_supervision_probe_v0.py; model checkpoints excluded from PR (regeneratable).
